title: Author VaultAppModel typed primitive — substrate's MCP replacement for local-machine vault operations
description:
Per [[agent-abilities-pokemon-mechanics-with-topology-2026-05-26]] corollary: 'MCP is a misplaced vaults app.' Most current MCP tools (screenshot, clipboard, file-read, keyboard, browser-control, application-control) are local-machine vault operations that should be typed kura-tier primitives, NOT external protocol registrations. Typed shape proposal: `VaultAppModel { slug, kuraVaultRef: LinkRefModel, exposedOperations: [VaultOperationModel], requiredEntitlements: [...], runtimeSurface: enum (apple-platform / cross-platform / linux-server) }`. Where kura-tier vault is the substrate-canonical storage primitive. Concrete vault-apps to model: screen.vault, clipboard.vault, keyboard.vault, browser.vault, agentify.vault, notion.vault. Each becomes a typed Codable record an agent's ability can declare as required-acquisition. Substrate-architecture migration: existing MCP tool registrations replaced with VaultApp declarations. Substantial substrate-architecture work — coordinate via thread.

## Composes with existing types (per [[cost-model-non-divergence-discipline]])

- (NEW typed primitive — composition surface TBD; will likely reference InferenceUsageEvent for vault-call cost tracking via the sync-cost expansion)
